en.name: Tapa
en.desc: Create a continuous wall of shaded cells!
en.description: Tapa is a shading puzzle where you create a single continuous wall of black cells. Number clues in cells show the lengths of consecutive black cell runs in the 8 surrounding cells. Multiple numbers mean separate runs with at least one white cell between. No 2×2 area can be all black!
en.objectives: Shade cells to form a single connected wall that satisfies all clue numbers and contains no 2×2 all-black areas.
en.howToPlay: Click cells to shade them black. All black cells must be connected. Clue numbers show lengths of consecutive black runs around that cell. No 2×2 area can be all black.

rules.controls: Click a cell to toggle between shaded (black) and unshaded (white). Right-click or long-press to mark cells as definitely white.
mechanics: All shaded cells must form one connected wall
Clue numbers show lengths of consecutive shaded runs in the 8 neighbors
Multiple numbers mean separate runs with gaps between
A '0' clue means no shaded neighbors
No 2×2 area can be completely shaded

tips: All black cells must connect to form a single wall
No 2x2 area can be completely black
Multiple numbers mean separate runs with gaps
0 clues mean all surrounding cells are white

faq.question: What do multiple numbers in a clue mean?
faq.answer: If a cell shows '1 2', it means there are two separate black runs around it: one of length 1 and another of length 2, with at least one white cell between them.

faq.question: Can the wall have branches or holes?
faq.answer: The wall must be a single connected group (branches are OK), but it cannot have isolated sections. All black cells must reach each other through adjacent black cells.

faq.question: What about the 2×2 rule?
faq.answer: No 2×2 square anywhere in the grid can be completely filled with black cells. This is a key constraint that often helps solve puzzles.

faq.question: How do I use '0' clues?
faq.answer: A '0' clue is very powerful - it means all 8 surrounding cells must be white. Use these to establish safe cells early.

zh.name: 塔帕
zh.description: 塔帕是一个涂色谜题，创建单一连续的黑色格子墙。格子中的数字提示显示周围8个格子中连续黑色格子的长度。多个数字表示分开的连续段，中间至少有一个白色格子。没有2×2区域可以全黑！
zh.objectives: 涂黑格子形成单一连通的墙，满足所有提示数字，不包含2×2全黑区域。
zh.howToPlay: 涂黑格子形成单一连续墙。数字表示周围涂黑格子的连续长度（多个数字表示多段墙）。墙不能形成2×2黑色区域。某些格子必须留白。

rules.controls: 点击格子切换涂黑（黑色）和未涂黑（白色）。右键或长按将格子标记为确定的白色。
mechanics: 所有涂黑格子必须形成一堵连通的墙
提示数字显示周围8个邻居中连续涂黑格子的长度
多个数字表示分开的连续段，中间有间隔
没有2×2区域可以完全涂黑

tips: 从数字约束最多的格子开始
墙必须是单一连续区域
数字格子本身从不被涂黑

faq.question: 提示中的多个数字是什么意思？
faq.answer: 如果格子显示'1 2'，表示周围有两个分开的黑色连续段：一段长度1，另一段长度2，中间至少有一个白色格子。

faq.question: 关于2×2规则呢？
faq.answer: 网格中任何地方都不能有2×2正方形完全填满黑色格子。这是一个关键约束，经常帮助解题。
